LanguageData.APM_NotMechanoid: Only mechanoids can be repaired here.
LanguageData.APM_RepairStation_CannotRepairSatellite: Satellites cannot be repaired in repair stations.
LanguageData.APM_NotPlayerFaction: Only friendly mechanoids can be repaired.
LanguageData.APM_WrongSize: Mechanoid size must be {0} for this station.
LanguageData.APM_AutoRepairOrdered: Repair station scanning found {0}. Repairs ordered.
LanguageData.APM_Gizmo_AutoRepair_Desc: Automatically scan for damaged mechs and assign them to the station.
LanguageData.APM_Settings_ShowRepairStationAutoRepair: Show a message when a repair station automatically calls a mechanoid for repairs.
LanguageData.APM_FullHealth: This mechanoid is already at full health.
LanguageData.APM_CommandCancelRepairDesc: Stop repairing and eject the mechanoid.
LanguageData.APM_RepairStation_ArmEditor_GizmoDesc: Open a live editor for repair station arm offsets.
LanguageData.APM_RepairStation_ArmEditor_NoStation: No repair station arms are available.
LanguageData.APM_RepairStation_ArmEditor_LivePreviewO: Live preview is active for this view.
Editing {0}; live preview requires a station facing that way.
LanguageData.APM_RepairStation_ArmEditor_Footer: Changes are applied live to this station's current in-memory def. Copy XML when the offsets look right.
